race.comment: ORNOS (8) can be a quick improver off an even first-up run here over 1300m, firmly in the market there when battling into a close-up sixth. His form last time in over this sort of range reads very well for this and expect he runs a strong race. BEL MEZYAAN (4) is a lightly raced gelding who won his maiden dominantly when backed into $1.70 at Ballarat, charging home from a wide gate to score by nearly 3 lengths. Off that, he should relish 1500m and will be well fancied to go on and win again. MUSKITO (7) was an easy maiden winner on debut at Ararat over 1300m. This is a fair bit harder but he can measure right up. ORGANICS (9) has won two on the bounce at Wangaratta and has to be respected.
